name: lupine
description: Podcast 2.0 Desktop Application - Full PC20 namespace support
author: Nathan Stallings

scripts.build:win: vite build && electron-builder --win nsis --publish never --config electron-builder.json
scripts.build:win:portable: vite build && electron-builder --win portable --publish never --config electron-builder.json
scripts.build:snap: vite build && electron-builder --linux snap --publish never --config electron-builder.json
scripts.build:appimage: vite build && electron-builder --linux AppImage --publish never --config electron-builder.json
scripts.build:deb: vite build && electron-builder --linux deb --publish never --config electron-builder.json
scripts.build:mac: vite build && electron-builder --mac dmg --publish never --config electron-builder.json
